title: [Sylinar's Spire, Bed Chamber]
description: Broad windows set deep within pale stone are flanked by sturdy shutters and framed in heavy, dark velvet drapes that fall in straight, weighty lines.  Near the far wall, a low hearth rests within a carved limestone surround, ready to lend warmth when lit to the otherwise austere space.  A dark four-poster bed of dark wood rests beneath a woven throw in muted earth tones, while a small cedar chest of sticks and saddle stand sit nearby.  Opposite, a zydris-framed painting captures a powerful horse in motion, its form rendered with precision.
